title: sphedamnocarpus pruriens subsp. pruriens
intro: Sphedamnocarpus pruriens subsp. pruriens, also known as the 'thorny caltrop,' is a plant species belonging to the family Zygophyllaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its seeds, which contain a wealth of bioactive compounds, including alkaloids and flavonoids. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce stress, improve cognitive function, and enhance overall well-being, although further research is needed to confirm these effects. Sphedamnocarpus pruriens subsp. pruriens is traditionally used in herbal preparations, such as decoctions and infusions, to promote relaxation and vitality.
